ddls:
CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Hash representing the commit */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the commit */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who made the commit */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message of the commit */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch associated with this commit */,
  "merge_request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the merge request associated with this commit */,
  "is_tagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the commit is tagged */,
  "is_merge" INTEGER /* Indicates if the commit is a merge commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branching ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_merge_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("merge_request_id") REFERENCES merges ("merge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file in the repository */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository to which the file belongs */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modified date and time of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., .py, .java) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repo_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the repository was created */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the repository */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the repository */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the repository is private */,
  "default_branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the default branch of the repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repository_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repositories_default_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("default_branch_id") REFERENCES branching ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repositories_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change record */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit associated with this change */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file that was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, delete) */,
  "insertions" INTEGER /* Number of insertions made in this change */,
  "deletions" INTEGER /* Number of deletions made in this change */,
  "diff" TEXT /* Diff of the changes made */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Commit message for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_changes_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_changes_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the author account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the author account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, contributor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned to the user */,
  "is_inherited" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is inherited from a parent role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit this tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of the tag (e.g., release, bugfix) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branching" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the branch belongs to */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the default branch */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the branch was created */,
  "last_commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the last commit on the branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_branching_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_branching_last_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "merges" (
  "merge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each merge operation */,
  "source_branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source branch */,
  "target_branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target branch */,
  "merge_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the merge operation */,
  "merge_message" TEXT /* Message of the merge */,
  "is_reverted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the merge was reverted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("merge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_merges_target_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_branch_id") REFERENCES branching ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_merges_source_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_branch_id") REFERENCES branching ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit associated with this issue */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the issue (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the issue */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branching ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related commit */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., commit, issue, merge) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)
